name: Pere Ravage

abilities.name: Demise (Explosive)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, deal 2 damage to models within (r) 2".

abilities.name: Pyromania
abilities.text: After this model receives a raise, give a Burning token to a model within 6".

actions.name: Burn Stick
actions.effects: If the target has a Burning token, move the target up to 3". Target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Blastwave
triggers.text: Move each model damaged by this action up to 2".

triggers.name: Blow It to Hell
triggers.text: Remove all destructible terrain and markers within (t)2" of the target.

actions.name: Light Under Their Feet
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp. This model may remove a Burning token from the target to have it ignore models and terrain while moving.

merge_warnings: Tactical action 'Light Under Their Feet' has resist='Wp' â€” may be attack action under tactical header (layout exception). Reclassifying as attack_action.
